archimate:DataObject.name: ESPD-EDM
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The European Single Procurement Document (ESPD) is a standardized form used in public procurement processes within the European Union (EU). As a data object, the ESPD represents a structured document that contains essential information about a supplier or contractor. It includes details such as the company's identification, financial standing, technical and professional abilities, and any legal grounds for exclusion. The ESPD serves as a preliminary self-declaration by suppliers, allowing them to demonstrate their eligibility and suitability to participate in public procurement procedures across EU member states.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: The Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://docs.ted.europa.eu/ESPD-EDM/latest/index.html
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Data Models
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ESPD-EDMDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ESPD-EDMDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataModelDataObject

properties.value: The Publications Office of the European Union

The European Single Procurement Document (ESPD) is a standardized form used in public procurement processes within the European Union (EU). As a data object, the ESPD represents a structured document that contains essential information about a supplier or contractor. It includes details such as the company's identification, financial standing, technical and professional abilities, and any legal grounds for exclusion. The ESPD serves as a preliminary self-declaration by suppliers, allowing them to demonstrate their eligibility and suitability to participate in public procurement procedures across EU member states.
